name: orchestration tools registered — all 6 present with correct modes, previews, and input schemas
description: Registry inspection check for Stage 10.4 deliverables. Loads an isolated copy of the tool registry and verifies: (1) all 6 orchestration.* tools are present by name, (2) start_loop and abort have required_mode WORKSPACE_WRITE, (3) get_status has required_mode READ_ONLY, (4) all 6 tools have a preview function (write tools have explicit previews; read tools have noop preview from defineTool), (5) all 6 have an input_schema object. No I/O — deterministic registry metadata inspection.
